title: T-001 — scanner_sessions + users PIN columns migration (06-a)
prompt:
# T-001 — scanner_sessions + users PIN columns migration

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.1 FR-SC-BE-001/004/005, §12.1, §12.2 D8
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce the `scanner_sessions` table and the PIN-related columns on `users` so that scanner login/PIN setup/PIN rotation can be implemented (FR-SC-BE-001..005).

## Implementation contract
1. New Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0060_scanner_sessions_and_pin.sql`:
   - CREATE TABLE scanner_sessions (id UUID PK default gen_random_uuid, user_id UUID FK users.id, org_id UUID, site_id UUID NULL, line_id UUID NULL, shift_id UUID NULL, device_mode TEXT CHECK IN ('personal','kiosk'), device_type TEXT, ip_address INET, user_agent TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ default now, expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ, last_activity_at TIMESTAMPTZ, ended_at TIMESTAMPTZ NULL).
   - ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN scanner_pin_hash TEXT NULL, ADD COLUMN pin_last_changed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NULL, ADD COLUMN pin_rotation_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, ADD COLUMN preferred_device_mode TEXT CHECK IN ('personal','kiosk') NULL.
   - Indexes: scanner_sessions (org_id, user_id, created_at DESC), (org_id, expires_at) WHERE ended_at IS NULL.
   - ENABLE RLS on scanner_sessions with policy `tenant_isolation_scanner_sessions` (org_id = current_setting('app.org_id')::uuid).
2. Drizzle schema entry `packages/db/src/schema/scanner-sessions.ts` mirroring columns; export Insert/Select.
3. Extend `packages/db/src/schema/users.ts` with the four new columns.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0060_scanner_sessions_and_pin.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/scanner-sessions.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/users.ts [modify]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/scanner-sessions.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0060 runs on a fresh DB, when describing scanner_sessions, then both indexes exist and RLS is enabled with the tenant_isolation policy
2. Given migration 0060 runs, when describing users, then scanner_pin_hash/pin_last_changed_at/pin_rotation_required/preferred_device_mode columns exist with the documented defaults and CHECK constraints
3. Given two orgs with rows in scanner_sessions, when querying under org A app.org_id, then no org B rows are returned

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/scanner-sessions.test.ts asserting all three ACs before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test scanner-sessions'

## Risk red lines
- Do not drop existing users columns
- Do not skip RLS policy
- Do not store the PIN in plaintext anywhere

pipeline_inputs.description: Add scanner_sessions table + users PIN columns with RLS so scanner auth endpoints can land.
pipeline_inputs.details: Drizzle migration 0060 creates scanner_sessions (per §8.1 FR-SC-BE-001 column list) with two indexes and RLS, and extends users with scanner_pin_hash/pin_last_changed_at/pin_rotation_required/preferred_device_mode. Drizzle schema mirrors both. Tests verify index presence, RLS isolation, and users column defaults.
out_of_scope: Do not implement the login endpoint here (T-006)
Do not seed PIN values here (T-048 seed)

Given migration 0060 runs, when describing users, then scanner_pin_hash/pin_last_changed_at/pin_rotation_required/preferred_device_mode exist with the documented defaults and CHECK constraints
Given two orgs with rows in scanner_sessions, when querying under org A app.org_id, then no org B rows are returned

Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test scanner-sessions'
risk_red_lines: Do not drop existing users columns
